title: Gujarat University – Research Assistant – 5 Posts
shortInfo: Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 5 Research Assistant posts. Candidates with M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, M.Ed, NET/GSET, or Ph.D. qualifications can apply offline before 28-05-2026 through the official Gujarat University website.

basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 5 Research Assistant posts. Candidates with M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, M.Ed, NET/GSET, or Ph.D. qualifications can apply offline before 28-05-2026 through the official Gujarat University website.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Sciences / Arts / Commerce (M.Sc. / M.A. / M.Com.) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university, Postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed.) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university, Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or similar test like GSET, or awarded Ph.D. degree in Education as per UGC regulations

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gujarat University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
